import React from'react';/**
 * Debounce a function
 * @param pulse
 * @param fn
 * @param delay
 */export default function useDebounceFn(pulse,fn){var delay=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:500;var callbackRef=React.useRef(fn);React.useLayoutEffect(function(){callbackRef.current=fn;});// reset the timer to call the fn everytime the pulse value changes
React.useEffect(function(){var timerId=setTimeout(fn,delay);return function(){return clearTimeout(timerId);};},[pulse,delay]);}
